history.text: West Indies Associated States tied the territory into a wider political structure.
Dominica asserted sovereignty and adopted constitutional rules for self-government.

worthSeeing.title: Boiling Lake:
worthSeeing.text: A flooded fumarole - the second largest boiling lake in the world, reached by a full-day trek.

worthSeeing.title: Morne Trois Pitons:
worthSeeing.text: A UNESCO national park of volcanic features, forests and crater lakes.

worthSeeing.title: Whale Watching:
worthSeeing.text: Dominica is one of the best places in the world to see sperm whales year-round.
